issues.sample: THE AUTOMATIC START/STOP FUEL-SAVING ENGINE FEATURE ENGAGES PREMATURELY, BEFORE THE VEHICLE HAS COME TO A COMPLETE STOP.  AS A RESULT, THE VEHICLE FEELS LIKE THE BRAKES HAVE BEEN ARTIFICIALLY AND AGGRESSIVELY APPLIED TO BRING THE CAR TO A COMPLETE STOP BEFORE THE START/STOP ENGIN

narrative.headline: What 2017 Audi A7 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (100% of reports).
